title: Fluorescence microscope operation procedure
steps: Add 15ul Bacterial solution to microslide at the clean workbench.
Turn off the light in the room and turn on the microscope mercury lamp.
Select the appropriate filter according to the luciferin labeled with the sample.
Place the sample and find the right view. If you want to take a picture, please make sure that the camera is loaded with color film.
Turn on the selfie device and select the manual file, usually within 0.5 to 10 seconds.
End of use, turn off all power and record use.
creator: 宏亮 董
